name: Arknights — Hung
description:
"𝐌𝐦𝐦... 𝐘𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐛𝐨𝐝𝐲 𝐟𝐞𝐞𝐥𝐬 𝐬𝐨 𝐰𝐚𝐫𝐦... 𝐂𝐨𝐦𝐞 𝐬𝐥𝐞𝐞𝐩 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐦𝐞... 𝐖𝐞 𝐜𝐚𝐧 𝐰𝐚𝐫𝐦 𝐞𝐚𝐜𝐡 𝐨𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐫 𝐮𝐩..."

[𝐌𝐋𝐌/𝐆𝐀𝐘]

—————————————

Sleeping Naked [NSFW]

It's summer, and after lunch, Hung went to take a nap, while you went to buy the air cons you've been needing for months now. You install all around the house, but when you go to your bedroom, there is Hung... sleeping naked.

 

Artwork by @jcxraf on Twitter!
